overall_verdict: CONDITIONAL PASS — 4 of 10 microtest prospects score >=90 and may be sent. 6 are held for score <90.

review_criteria.spam_risk: ALL 10 PASS — no spam patterns. 3-sentence personalized emails. No mass templates. No generic subjects.
review_criteria.value_clarity: ALL 10 PASS — each email clearly states what the recipient gets (working embed, fixed link, custom tool).
review_criteria.personalization: ALL 10 PASS — each email references specific page/resource/tool relevant to that recipient.
review_criteria.channel_fit: ALL 10 PASS — each prospect matches channel criteria (resource page, broken link, roundup, or partner).
review_criteria.no_link_spam_pattern: ALL 10 PASS — no exact-match anchors, no reciprocal link offers, no paid link implications.
review_criteria.no_exact_anchor_request: ALL 10 PASS — no anchor text requested in any draft.
review_criteria.no_paid_exchange_implication: ALL 10 PASS — all offers are free with no strings attached.

send_decision.reason: High score, perfect channel fit, personalized to known FI blogger
Highest score, broken-link outreach has best reply rate, genuine value
Highest score, broken widget replacement is genuinely helpful
Meets threshold, strong value proposition for nonprofits
Score <90. Good prospect but needs more research on contact path.
Score <90. Previously tracked, need better contact path.
Score <90. Good organization but need clearer contact.
Score <90. Close — research specific roundup article first.
Score <90. Research their tools page acceptance criteria.
Score <90. Custom offer requires identifying specific article first.

conditions_for_held_prospects: Research contact paths, identify specific pages/articles, resubmit for review when score >=90
